title: Welcome to the new Replica Site
content: This is our new localized portal. We will be syndicating important updates, literature releases, and global event announcements from Shantikunj Haridwar right here.

title: Ashwamedha Yagya Preparations
content: Global preparations for the upcoming Ashwamedha Yagya are in full swing. Volunteers across all chapters are encouraged to participate in local awareness campaigns.
